ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground or stadium of the team */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team's uniform */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "team_sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the team's primary sponsor */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* URL to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds in the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Total points */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current position in the league table */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between goals for and goals against */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of matches where the team did not concede any goals */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., 'Completed', 'Postponed') */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the match referee */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_report_url" TEXT /* URL to the match report or highlights */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., 'Forward', 'Midfielder') */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "player_jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "player_contract_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract started */,
  "player_contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract ends */,
  "player_injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player (e.g., 'Fit', 'Injured') */,
  "player_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles */,
  "disposals" INTEGER /* Total disposals */,
  "kicks" INTEGER /* Number of kicks */,
  "handballs" INTEGER /* Number of handballs */,
  "marks" INTEGER /* Number of marks */,
  "hitouts" INTEGER /* Number of hitouts */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions */,
  "clearances" INTEGER /* Number of clearances */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'admin', 'team staff', 'public user') */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., 'Active', 'Inactive') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being accessed */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., 'view', 'edit') */,
  "user_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the data */,
  "user_device" TEXT /* Device used by the user when accessing the data (e.g., 'Desktop', 'Mobile') */,
  "user_browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user when accessing the data (e.g., 'Chrome', 'Safari') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Total points */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current position in the league table */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the historical record */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team in the historical season */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team in the historical season */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between goals for and goals against in the historical season */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of matches where the team did not concede any goals in the historical season */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards received in the historical season */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards received in the historical season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
